title: November 20
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 20''' is the 324th day of the year (325th in leap years). There are 41 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Ming-Na Wen]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Henry Gilroy]] is born.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Battle in the Streets!]]'' released on [[Wizards.com]].
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 47]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 10]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2003 – ''[[Nightsaber]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[HoloNet News — Rodia Supply Lanes Attacked by Pirates]]'' released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2009]] – "[[Legacy of Terror]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*2009 – ''[[The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs]]'' is released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2010]] – The film [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']] makes its television premiere on Cartoon Network.
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars: Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin (HC)|''Star Wars: Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin'' hardcover]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 75|''Star Wars'' (2015) 75]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Chapter 12: The Siege]]" premiered on [[Disney+]].
*[[2020]] – [[The Mandalorian: Season 2 - Vol. 1 (Chapters 9-12) (Original Score)|''The Mandalorian'': Season 2 - Vol. 1 (Chapters 9-12) [Original Score]]] was digitally released.
*[[2024]] – [[Battle of Jakku — Republic Under Siege 1|''Battle of Jakku — Republic Under Siege'' 1]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 12|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 12]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[The Book of Boba Fett Junior Novel (audiobook)|''The Book of Boba Fett Junior Novel'' audiobook]] released.
